payment.heading: Payment
payment.price: $50 for 1 on 1 lesson | $20 for group lesson
payment.note: Pay before your session. Venmo preferred — PayPal charges a transaction fee.

items.question: What time are your Group Lessons?
What is your chess rating?
items.answer:
I've hit 2113 rapid and 1978 blitz on chess.com.

My USCF is currently 1560, but I haven't put a ton of time into OTB chess.

items.question: What rating range do you coach?
items.answer: All levels welcome. Sessions are tailored to where you are and where you want to go.

items.question: How long have you been coaching?
items.answer: I've been teaching chess for around 2 years.

items.question: What are your favourite openings?
items.answer:
My favourite opening is the Jobava.

I play the Jobava London for white.
I play the Caro Kann and the Dutch for black.
